_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill in depicting source or collateral data on a network map.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in mapping personal data flows across systems, vendors, and jurisdictions to produce records of processing activities (RoPA) in compliance with regulatory requirements.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI SP domain. SP-S-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DA-S-001 (DA, cosine: 0.458), TF-S-011 (TF, cosine: 0.445).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.2/10 (raw 0.521). Shared vocabulary: [data, skill]. DCWF-only terms [collateral, depicting, map, network, source] vs WIDAI-only terms [across, activities, compliance, flows, jurisdictions, mapping] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.866 (P=0.884, R=0.849). P exceeds R by 0.035 — the DCWF element's 11 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 23 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (100.0%). "Skill in depicting source or collateral data on a network map." and "Skill in mapping personal data flows across systems, vendors, and jurisdictions" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.464 < STS 0.521 (gap -0.058). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [collateral, depicting, map] and [across, activities, compliance] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 10.0%. Shared tokens: [data, skill]. DCWF-only: [collateral, depicting, map, network, source]. WIDAI-only: [across, activities, compliance, flows, jurisdictions, mapping].
